items.content: New in Gemini: NEET practice tests! 🇮🇳🩺 Sending good luck to everyone taking India's biggest medical exam in a few weeks. You've got this! We’re working on adding more practice tests for different subjects and countries. What should we add next? Let us know below 👇 https://t.co/EnCMI4Opdz

items.title: Create your first full song today. For free. In under 50 days, over 100 million songs have been…
items.content: Create your first full song today. For free. In under 50 days, over 100 million songs have been generated on @GeminiApp. To celebrate, we’re unlocking the full power of our music model, Lyria 3. Here’s what you get starting today: 🎵 Generate up to 5 full-length tracks every day (~3 mins each) 🎵 Hit your limit? Keep creating 30-second clips, or upgrade for more Images, video, and now music. You have the ideas. Gemini has the tools. Start creating!
